archive.title: Archive
archive.description: Pick a past day and play that day’s puzzles. Progress is saved per day; leaderboard scores use the puzzle date.

home.title: Dagrun
home.subtitle: Daily fun games to challenge your memory, logic, and world knowledge

waterfall.title: Waterfall of the day
waterfall.description: Guess the Icelandic waterfall from a photo

flags.title: Flag of the day
flags.description: Guess the country from its flag

world.title: Country guess
world.description: Guess the country from its silhouette

birds.title: Bird spotter
birds.description: Identify today's mystery bird from a photo

plants.title: Plant ID
plants.description: Name the plant hiding in today's close-up

dogbreed.title: Dog breed guess
dogbreed.description: Guess the dog breed from a mystery photo

car.title: Car guess
car.description: Identify the car model from a close-up shot

mushroom.title: Mushroom Quiz
mushroom.description: 5 rounds — identify each mushroom from 4 multiple-choice options

color.title: Color Match
color.description: Memorize a color and recreate it with RGB sliders

mountains.title: Peak finder
mountains.description: Guess the mountain from a single photograph

year.title: Year Guess
year.description: Guess the year a historical photo was taken — 5 rounds

account.title: Your profile
account.subtitle: Upload a picture for your account and the leaderboards.
account.hint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF · max 2 MB

consent.title: Storage & cookies
consent.body: We use browser storage so you can sign in and save game progress. Hosting may set necessary cookies. We do not use third‑party advertising cookies. Optional analytics helps us improve the site if you allow it.
consent.essentialCheckbox: I agree to necessary storage for sign-in and daily games (required to continue).
consent.analyticsCheckbox: Allow optional anonymous analytics (you can leave this off).
